name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
You kept something casual; you loved him, but this feeling was unrequited — and now you are pregnant, and Leon is the father 💔

Detail, he does not want to be a father, and does not even know about his pregnancy 😔

You are co-workers, the age difference you decide, but this old man is type 37 ✨

First bot of the year, and I thought of posting something obscene, but I'm in the dark of depression LMAOOOO, jokes aside, this bot was moldy in the drafts and with some changes, I found it decent to post YAY 🙌😊💗

I'm busy with college and work, so I'm kind of inactive lol, but I'll try to reconcile all this to be able to stay activated here ;333 😜💗

In the meantime, we hit ✨2K✨ and I am very grateful for that, knowing that many people like my writing and what I produce, makes me very happy, like a lot (I almost screamed when I saw it, and so far I can't believe it) 😭 I have no words to describe how happy I am, without you I probably wouldn't have made it my favorite hobby, I love you very much, and I am grateful for the support, for every comment, every like. Sending lots of kisses and hugs to each one, love you guys so much ! Wishing a good 2026 to each ! 🙌😭💗💗💗💕

I will make a special bot for 2k, and in this form you can vote for the version and theme 😊😭💕💕
creator: y4su
